About / 01

Engineering meets
the web

I'm Rahul — a Production Engineering student at NIT Calicut who found his real passion in building for the web. From designing the official SNS Club platform to shipping an AI-powered meditation app, I love turning ideas into working products.

I work across the full stack — React on the frontend, Python on the backend — and integrate AI into everything I build. Currently exploring how LLMs, computer vision and real-world engineering can intersect.

When I'm not coding, I'm doing advanced video editing in DaVinci Resolve or contributing to student club initiatives on campus.

Location Calicut, Kerala, India
Native Gopalganj, Bihar
Education B.Tech, NIT Calicut
CGPA 6.48 (till S5)

Projects / 03

Things I've
actually built

01

SNS Club Platform

Official website for the SNS Club at NIT Calicut. Students can browse and register for club events. Built with a full-stack architecture: React.js frontend, Node.js/Express backend, and MongoDB for data storage. Features an integrated LLaMA AI chatbot that answers questions and handles registrations conversationally.

React.js Node.js Express MongoDB LLaMA API AI Chatbot Event Platform
Visit Site ↗
02

Medico — Wellness App

An AI-powered meditation wellness application that assesses a user's meditation quality in real time. Uses RPPG (Remote Photoplethysmography) for heart rate detection and MediaPipe for face landmark detection via webcam.

Python Java MediaPipe RPPG Computer Vision AI
Visit Site ↗
03
Bluestock Internship · 2026

MDDS India Village Directory API

A production-grade B2B SaaS API platform serving 640,000+ Indian villages across all states. Designed a normalized PostgreSQL database, built a secure REST API with Redis rate limiting and bcrypt API key authentication, and developed 3 React frontends — Admin Dashboard with analytics charts, B2B Client Portal with API key management, and a live village autocomplete Demo App. Deployed entirely on Vercel.

Node.js Express PostgreSQL Prisma Redis React Tailwind CSS Python Vercel 640K+ Villages
